text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 80 

DAILY_RATE 

LABEL: Daily Rate that a Policy will Pay for a Covered Service 

DESCRIPTION: The amount a policy will pay per day for a covered service. In some cases, for OT claims this is referred 
to as a flat rate. 

SHORT NAME: DAILY_RATE 

LONG NAME: DAILY_RATE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: Dollar
